extracted.title: ETNG Operational Flow Order -- UPDATE -- EFF 2/3
extracted.description:
Effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 3, 2026, ETNG is lifting the Balancing Alert Operational Flow Order for the following operational areas issued January 24, 2026:

i) all meters on Line 3200 between Tracy City and Topside including all meters on the 3500 Line,

ii) all meters east of the Rural Retreat Compressor Station that are on the 8" and 12" system but excluding meters on ETNG's 3600-1 Line.

ETNG requires any imbalance payback be coordinated through your Operations Account Representative. If necessary, ETNG will utilize any provision of its tariff to ensure system integrity including the issuance of customer specific or system wide OFOs.

Additionally, the previously posted Hourly Customer Specific OFO and System Wide OFO will continue to remain in effect.

Please refer to the table below for the effected ETNG operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Operational Areas / Gas Day February 2 / Gas Day February 3 and until further notice:
- System Wide: OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500 (Feb 2) | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500 (Feb 3+)
- 3200 Line for all meters between Tracy City and Topside including all meters on the 3500 Line: OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 4% / 500 (Feb 2) | No OFO (Feb 3+)
- 3300 Line for all meters East of Rural Retreat on the 8" and 12" system (excluding meters on the 3600-1 line): OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500 (Feb 2) | No OFO (Feb 3+)
- Hourly Customer Specific Operational Flow Order: OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe (See Posting for Effective Time / Tolerance Calculation) (Feb 2) | OFO In Effect; No Due Pipe (See Posting for Effective Time / Tolerance Calculation) (Feb 3+)
- MAD: MAD In Effect; MAD 2% / 500 (Feb 2) | No MAD (Feb 3+)

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
affectedLocations: All meters on Line 3200 between Tracy City and Topside (including all meters on the 3500 Line)
All meters east of the Rural Retreat Compressor Station on the 8" and 12" system (excluding meters on ETNG's 3600-1 Line)
3300 Line (all meters East of Rural Retreat on the 8" and 12" system, excluding 3600-1 line)
